message:
feat(core): scope watchdog diagnostics + priority classifier telemetry refactor

Add ScopeWatchdog module (859 lines) providing orphan-task, deadlock,
stuck-cancellation, and zombie-scope detection for the structured
concurrency scope tree. Periodic scans against ScopeTree snapshots emit
WatchdogAlerts with severity levels (Warning, Error, Critical) for:
- Orphan tasks: parent scope closed but child still running
- Deadlocks: circular wait-for dependencies among draining scopes
- Stuck cancellations: scopes in Draining beyond grace period
- Zombie scopes: finalizers hung in Finalizing state indefinitely
- Scope leaks: unbounded scope accumulation over time

Refactor PriorityClassifier telemetry to move the classification counter
from PriorityClassifierTelemetry (shared atomic) to a dedicated
total_classifications field on the classifier itself. This separates
classification counting from the other telemetry counters, allowing
the telemetry snapshot to accept the total as a parameter rather than
tracking it redundantly. Removes 6 telemetry unit tests that tested
the old per-counter pattern (now covered by metrics() assertions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
